---
title: Costs and Getting Access
---

## How to request access
Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam has a campus licence for PhD candidates only. The iThenticate key-users within the faculties are the points of contact for creating accounts for PhD candidates. For requesting ithenticate account you can create a ticket in the [VU Service Portal](https://services.vu.nl/esc?id=sc_cat_item&sys_id=b1a32e6797c6a910e553359fe153afd5). An iThenticate key user will contact you.

A list of key users per faculty can be found in [the Handbook](key-users.qmd)

## Costs
There are no direct costs involved.
